ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., dose-response, time-course) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the experiment */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab where the experiment is conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sample_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sample */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "sample_time" TEXT /* Time when the sample was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replicates" (
  "replicate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each replicate */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the replicate belongs to */,
  "replicate_number" INTEGER /* Number of the replicate */,
  "replicate_date" TEXT /* Date when the replicate was created */,
  "replicate_time" TEXT /* Time when the replicate was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("replicate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replicates_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doses" (
  "dose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dose */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the dose belongs to */,
  "dose_value" REAL /* Value of the dose */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the dose (e.g., kg, mg) */,
  "administration_date" TEXT /* Date when the dose was administered */,
  "administration_time" TEXT /* Time when the dose was administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doses_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pH_levels" (
  "pH_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pH level */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the pH level belongs to */,
  "pH_value" REAL /* Value of the pH level */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the pH level was measured */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the pH level was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pH_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pH_levels_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buffer_integrals" (
  "buffer_integral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buffer integral */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the buffer integral belongs to */,
  "buffer_integral_value" REAL /* Value of the buffer integral */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the buffer integral was calculated */,
  "calculation_time" TEXT /* Time when the buffer integral was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buffer_integral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buffer_integrals_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_origins" (
  "animal_origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal origin */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the animal origin belongs to */,
  "animal_origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the animal origin */,
  "origin_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the animal origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_origins_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_types" (
  "animal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal type */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the animal type belongs to */,
  "animal_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the animal type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the animal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_types_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delta_pH" (
  "delta_pH_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delta pH value */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the delta pH value belongs to */,
  "delta_pH_value" REAL /* Value of the delta pH */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the delta pH was calculated */,
  "calculation_time" TEXT /* Time when the delta pH was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delta_pH_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delta_pH_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "researcher_email" TEXT /* Email of the researcher */,
  "researcher_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab */,
  "lab_location" TEXT /* Location of the lab */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "experiment_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Number of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
